methodsAttempted.query: site:usek.edu.lb USEK artificial intelligence policy academic integrity students
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced official USEK PDF candidates on www.usek.edu.lb, including a Student Code of Conduct result mentioning generative Artificial Intelligence tools.
Firecrawl search surfaced the official journals.usek.edu.lb AEBJ author-instruction page with LLM and ChatGPT guidance.
Robots.txt for www.usek.edu.lb disallows User-agent: *; candidate PDF URLs were not used as evidence.
Robots.txt for journals.usek.edu.lb allows the AEBJ instruction and policies pages; both were fetched with a clear crawler user agent.

artifacts.summary: Official USEK-wide PDF candidates on www.usek.edu.lb were blocked by robots policy and returned 404 in initial probes, so they were rejected for evidence use. The official journals.usek.edu.lb AEBJ pages were accessible and support narrow journal-scope claims about generative AI in writing, authorship, disclosure, and peer review.

artifacts.title: Holy Spirit University of Kaslik staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence for Holy Spirit University of Kaslik is limited to official AEBJ journal-scope guidance on generative AI in scholarly writing, authorship, disclosure, and peer review. Robots-disallowed USEK-wide PDF candidates were rejected and not used as evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are scoped to the Arab Economic and Business Journal pages on the official USEK journals subdomain and should not be read as a university-wide student AI policy.
